metadata.description: The Microsoft Sentinel workspace into which the function will be deployed. Has to be in the selected Resource Group.
The region of the selected workspace. The default value will use the Region selection above.

properties.displayName: Alert Event ASIM filtering parser for Palo Alto XDR
properties.query:
let PaloXDRParser = (
    starttime: datetime=datetime(null),
    endtime: datetime=datetime(null),
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    hostname_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    username_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    attacktactics_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    attacktechniques_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    threatcategory_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    alertverdict_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    eventseverity_has_any: dynamic=dynamic([]),
    disabled: bool=false,
    pack: bool=false
)
{
    PaloAltoCortexXDR_Alerts_CL
    | where not(disabled)
    | where (
        (isnull(starttime) or TimeGenerated >= starttime)
        and (isnull(endtime) or TimeGenerated <= endtime)
        and ((array_length(ipaddr_has_any_prefix) == 0) or (has_any_ipv4_prefix(HostIp, ipaddr_has_any_prefix)))
        and ((array_length(hostname_has_any) == 0) or (HostName has_any (hostname_has_any)))
        // Pre-filter for username, refined later
        and ((array_length(username_has_any) == 0) or (UserName has_any (username_has_any)))
        // AttackTactics filtering done later in the parser
        // AttackTechniques filtering done later in the parser
        // ThreatCategory filtering done later in the parser
        and ((array_length(alertverdict_has_any) == 0)) // AlertVerdict detail not available in this parser.
        // EventSeverity filtering done later in the parser
    )
    | where Source startswith 'XDR Analytics' //filter out custom IOCs
    | where AgentOSType != 'NO_HOST' //filter out firewall detections
    | project-rename
        EventUid = _ItemId,
        EventOriginalUid = ExternalId,
        EventProductVersion = AgentVersion,
        AlertName = Name,
        AlertDescription = Description,
        ThreatId = MatchingServiceRuleId,
        ThreatFirstReportedTime = DetectionTimestamp,
        ThreatLastReportedTime = LocalInsert,
        Username = UserName,
        DvcIpAddr = HostIp,
        DvcHostname = HostName,
        EventOriginalSeverity = Severity,
        DvcId = EndpointId,
        DvcOs = AgentOSType,
        DvcAction = ActionPretty,
        DvcOriginalAction = Action
    | mv-apply i = split(DvcIpAddr, ',') to typeof(string) on (
        extend InternalIP = (ipv4_is_private(i))
        | extend
            DvcIpAddr = iff(InternalIP == true, i, ''),
            ExternalIpAddr = iff(InternalIP == false, i, '')
        | summarize DvcIpAddr = take_anyif(DvcIpAddr, isnotempty(DvcIpAddr)), ExternalIpAddr = take_anyif(ExternalIpAddr, isnotempty(ExternalIpAddr)), AllImpactedIpAddr = make_set_if(DvcIpAddr, isnotempty(DvcIpAddr)) by EventOriginalUid
    )
    | extend
        AlertId = EventOriginalUid,
        DetectionMethod = 'EDR',
        ThreatCategory = case(
            EventType == 'Process Execution' and AlertName has 'user', 'Security Policy Violation',
            EventType == 'Network Connections' and AlertName has 'Domain', 'MaliciousUrl',
            'Unknown'
        ),
        ThreatIsActive = (DvcAction !startswith 'Prevented'),
        AttackTactics = replace_regex(tostring(MitreTacticIdAndName), @'(TA\d{4})\s+-\s+([\w\s]+)', @'\2 (\1)'),
        AttackTechniques = replace_regex(tostring(MitreTechniqueIdAndName), @'(T[\d\.]+)\s+-\s+([\w\s-:]+)', @'\2 (\1)'),
        User = tostring(split(Username, @'\')[1]),
        UserType = case(
            Username has 'SYSTEM', 'System',
            Username has_any ('LOCAL SERVICE', 'NETWORK SERVICE'), 'Service',
            isempty(Username), '',
            'Regular'
        ),
        UsernameType = case(
            Username has @'\', 'Windows',
            Username has '@', 'UPN',
            'Simple'
        ),
        Url = coalesce(tostring(MaliciousUrls), DstActionExternalHostname),
        DvcIdType = iff(isnotempty(DvcId), 'Other', '')
    | where ((array_length(threatcategory_has_any) == 0) or (ThreatCategory has_any (threatcategory_has_any)))
    | project-away
        MitreTacticIdAndName,
        MitreTechniqueIdAndName
    | where ((array_length(attacktechniques_has_any) == 0) or (AttackTechniques has_any (attacktechniques_has_any)))
    | where ((array_length(attacktactics_has_any) == 0) or (AttackTactics has_any (attacktactics_has_any)))
    | project-rename
        ThreatOriginalCategory = EventType
    | extend
        ProcessId = tostring(coalesce(OsActorProcessOsPid, ActorProcessOsPid)),
        ProcessCommandLine = coalesce(ActionProcessImageCommandLine, ActorProcessCommandLine, CausalityActorProcessCommandLine),
        ProcessName = coalesce(ActionProcessImageName, ActorProcessImageName, CausalityActorProcessImageName),
        ProcessFileCompany = coalesce(ActionProcessSignatureVendor, ActorProcessSignatureVendor),
        FileName = coalesce(OsActorProcessImageName, ActionProcessImageName, ActorProcessImageName, CausalityActorProcessImageName),
        FilePath = coalesce(OsActorProcessImagePath, ActorProcessImagePath, CausalityActorProcessImagePath),
        FileSHA256 = coalesce(OsActorProcessImageSha256, ActorProcessImageSha256, CausalityActorProcessImageSha256),
        FileMD5 = coalesce(ActorProcessImageMd5, CausalityActorProcessImageMd5)
    | extend //Common Fields
        EventCount = toint(1),
        EventStartTime = ThreatFirstReportedTime,
        EventEndTime = ThreatLastReportedTime,
        EventType = 'Alert',
        EventSubType = 'Threat',
        EventMessage = AlertDescription,
        IpAddr = DvcIpAddr,
        Hostname = DvcHostname,
        Dvc = DvcHostname,
        EventSchema = 'AlertEvent',
        EventSchemaVersion = '0.1',
        EventSeverity = case(
            EventOriginalSeverity == 'high', 'High',
            EventOriginalSeverity == 'medium', 'Medium',
            EventOriginalSeverity == 'low', 'Low',
            'Informational'
            ),
        EventProduct = 'Cortex XDR',
        EventVendor = 'Palo Alto'
    | where ((array_length(eventseverity_has_any) == 0 or EventSeverity has_any (eventseverity_has_any)))
    | extend AdditionalFields = iff (
        pack,
        bag_pack(
            'MatchingStatus', MatchingStatus,
            'AttemptCounter', AttemptCounter,
            'Whitelisted', Whitelisted,
            'Starred', Starred,
            'Category', Category,
            'CausalityActorCausalityId', CausalityActorCausalityId,
            'ActorProcessSignatureStatus', ActorProcessSignatureStatus,
            'CausalityActorProcessCommandLine', CausalityActorProcessCommandLine,
            'CausalityActorProcessImageName', CausalityActorProcessImageName,
            'CausalityActorProcessImagePath', CausalityActorProcessImagePath,
            'CausalityActorProcessSignatureStatus', CausalityActorProcessSignatureStatus,
            'ActionCountry', ActionCountry,
            'ActorProcessImageName', ActorProcessImageName,
            'ActorProcessCommandLine', ActorProcessCommandLine,
            'ActionLocalIp', ActionLocalIp,
            'ActionRemoteIp', ActionRemoteIp,
            'ActionLocalPort', ActionLocalPort,
            'ActionRemotePort', ActionRemotePort,
            'OsActorProcessCommandLine', OsActorProcessCommandLine,
            'OsActorProcessImageName', OsActorProcessImageName,
            'OsActorProcessImagePath', OsActorProcessImagePath,
            'ProcessInstanceId', tostring(coalesce(ActorProcessInstanceId, ActorProcessCausalityId, ActorCausalityId, OsActorProcessCausalityId)),
            'IdentityType', tostring(coalesce(IdentityType, "")),
            'FwEmailRecipient', tostring(coalesce(FwEmailRecipient, "")),
            'FwEmailSender', tostring(coalesce(FwEmailSender, "")),
            'FwEmailSubject', tostring(coalesce(FwEmailSubject, "")),
            'DnsQueryName', tostring(coalesce(DnsQueryName, "")),
            'ExternalIpAddr', tostring(coalesce(columnifexists("ExternalIpAddr", ""), "")),
            'AllImpactedIpAddr', tostring(coalesce(columnifexists("AllImpactedIpAddr", ""), ""))
        ),
        dynamic([])
    )
    | project
        TimeGenerated,
        Type,
        EventUid,
        EventOriginalUid,
        EventProductVersion,
        AlertName,
        AlertDescription,
        ThreatId,
        ThreatFirstReportedTime,
        ThreatLastReportedTime,
        Username,
        UsernameType,
        DvcIpAddr,
        DvcHostname,
        EventOriginalSeverity,
        DvcId,
        DvcIdType,
        DvcOs,
        DvcAction,
        DvcOriginalAction,
        Url,
        AlertId,
        DetectionMethod,
        ThreatCategory,
        ThreatIsActive,
        AttackTactics,
        AttackTechniques,
        User,
        ThreatOriginalCategory,
        UserType,
        ProcessId,
        ProcessCommandLine,
        ProcessName,
        ProcessFileCompany,
        FileName,
        FilePath,
        FileSHA256,
        FileMD5,
        EventCount,
        EventStartTime,
        EventEndTime,
        EventType,
        EventSubType,
        EventMessage,
        IpAddr,
        Hostname,
        Dvc,
        EventSchema,
        EventSchemaVersion,
        EventSeverity,
        EventProduct,
        EventVendor,
        AdditionalFields
};
PaloXDRParser(
    starttime = starttime,
    endtime = endtime,
    ipaddr_has_any_prefix = ipaddr_has_any_prefix,
    hostname_has_any = hostname_has_any,
    username_has_any = username_has_any,
    attacktactics_has_any = attacktactics_has_any,
    attacktechniques_has_any = attacktechniques_has_any,
    threatcategory_has_any = threatcategory_has_any,
    alertverdict_has_any = alertverdict_has_any,
    eventseverity_has_any = eventseverity_has_any,
    disabled = disabled,
    pack = pack
)
